input.command: curl -s -X POST "https://api.relay.link/currencies/v2" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"chainIds":[8453],"defaultList":true,"limit":5}' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(d.get('symbol'), d.get('address'), d.get('metadata',{}).get('logoURI','NO_LOGO')[:60] if d.get('metadata',{}).get('logoURI') else 'NO_LOGO') for d in data[:5]]"
input.description: Check Relay currencies response with logo info

metadata.description: Check Relay currencies response with logo info
